chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَصِيدُ الصَّيْدَ مِنْ أَيْنَ يَفْدِيهِ وَ أَيْنَ يَذْبَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – The one in Ihraam hunts the prey, from where should he ransom it, and where should he slaughter it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/367)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/367)
text: يَفْدِي الْمُحْرِمُ فِدَاءَ الصَّيْدِ مِنْ حَيْثُ أَصَابَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, and Safwan, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,
‘Heasws said: ‘The one in Ihraam would pay the ransom of the hunted prey from wherever he attains it’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr and Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr and Safwan from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One who hunts in the state of Ihram must pay the ransom where he has hunted.’”
